name: Pommes Caramel (Caramel Apples)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a frying pan and add sugar. Stir until the sugar is dissolved and well blended with everything else.
2. Add vanilla to the mixture.
3. Core unpeeled apples, cut them into quarters, and add to the hot sugar mixture.
4. Simmer uncovered over medium heat, basting often with the syrup for 15-20 minutes.
